description:
Bash 'n' Crash

Choose: Double damage or @UUID[Compendium.shemetz-macros.critical-hits.RollTable.8cd22c4bb19d0270]{Injury}.

Shoved 20 feet. If it's pushed into another creature, object, or wall, each is dealt bludgeoning damage equal to the attack's damage halved. Otherwise, it falls prone.
